defias_bandit.name: Defias Bandit
defias_bandit.description: A member of the Defias Brotherhood.

kultiran_sailor.name: Kul'Tiran Sailor
kultiran_sailor.description: A heavily built sailor from Kul Tiras who crashes into enemies with reckless force.

kultiran_marine.name: Kul'Tiras Marine
kultiran_marine.description: A disciplined marine from Kul Tiras who fights with shield and sword, using Shield Bash to interrupt and stagger enemies.

enemy_test_caster.name: Test Caster
enemy_test_caster.description: A synthetic caster enemy for testing.

mottled_boar.name: Mottled Boar
mottled_boar.description: A mottled boar rooting about for food in the Valley of Trials.

scorpid_worker.name: Scorpid Worker
scorpid_worker.description: A dangerous scorpid whose venom can weaken even hardened warriors.

vile_familiar.name: Vile Familiar
vile_familiar.description: A wicked demonic imp bound to the Burning Blade Clan.

felstalker.name: Felstalker
felstalker.description: A fel-tainted hound prowling the dark corners of the valley.

sarkoth.name: Sarkoth
sarkoth.description: A massive scorpid lurking in the Valley of Trials, slain as part of the Burning Blade's initiation rite.

clattering_scorpid.name: Clattering Scorpid
clattering_scorpid.description: A large scorpid that rattles as it moves, its venom potent enough to weaken the heartiest warriors.

yarrog_baneshadow.name: Yarrog Baneshadow
yarrog_baneshadow.description: A warlock of the Burning Blade Clan wielding fel magic deep within the Valley of Trials.

kolkar_drudge.name: Kolkar Drudge
kolkar_drudge.description: A brutish Kolkar centaur pressed into hard labor, quick to stomp enemies into choking clouds of dust.

kolkar_outrunner.name: Kolkar Outrunner
kolkar_outrunner.description: A swift Kolkar centaur scout that peppers enemies with arrows before closing to melee range.

warlord_kolkanis.name: Warlord Kolkanis
warlord_kolkanis.description: The iron-fisted Warlord of the Kolkar, crushing all challengers under hoof and thunder.

dire_mottled_boar.name: Dire Mottled Boar
dire_mottled_boar.description: A large, aggressive boar with coarse mottled hide, charging anything that crosses its path in the arid plains of Durotar.

elder_mottled_boar.name: Elder Mottled Boar
elder_mottled_boar.description: A battle-scarred elder boar, tougher and more aggressive than its younger kin, dominating the rougher stretches of Durotar.

corrupted_mottled_boar.name: Corrupted Mottled Boar
corrupted_mottled_boar.description: A mottled boar twisted by dark corruption, its hide mottled with sickly discoloration as it charges through Durotar with reckless, savage fury.

pygmy_surf_crawler.name: Pygmy Surf Crawler
pygmy_surf_crawler.description: A barnacle-encrusted crab that hauls itself from the surf to prey on shore-dwellers.

makrura_clacker.name: Makrura Clacker
makrura_clacker.description: A large crustacean native to the rocky coastline of Durotar, named for the rhythmic clacking of its powerful claws. Its daze strike disorients prey, making escape difficult.

makrura_shellhide.name: Makrura Shellhide
makrura_shellhide.description: A heavily-armored Makrura crustacean whose thick, calcified shell turns aside glancing blows. Its daze strike leaves prey stumbling and unable to flee.

surf_crawler.name: Surf Crawler
surf_crawler.description: A massive barnacle-crusted crustacean that hauls itself from the surf to ambush coastal prey, its powerful claws delivering disorienting blows that leave victims reeling.

encrusted_surf_crawler.name: Encrusted Surf Crawler
encrusted_surf_crawler.description: An ancient surf crawler whose shell has become thoroughly encrusted with barnacles and hardened coral over years of coastal life. It moves with deceptive speed, sidestepping strikes with an agility that belies its armored bulk.

corrupted_surf_crawler.name: Corrupted Surf Crawler
corrupted_surf_crawler.description: A surf crawler warped by dark corruption, its shell slick with necrotic residue. Its claws deliver a rot that saps the strength from any it strikes.

razormane_quilboar.name: Razormane Quilboar
razormane_quilboar.description: A tusked quilboar warrior of the Razormane tribe, its bristling quills crackle with natural energy that retaliates against any who strike it in melee.

armored_scorpid.name: Armored Scorpid
armored_scorpid.description: A scorpid whose chitinous plates have thickened into natural armor, making it a formidable predator in the arid plains of Durotar.

bloodtalon_taillasher.name: Bloodtalon Taillasher
bloodtalon_taillasher.description: A swift, crimson-taloned lizard native to the sun-baked cliffs of Durotar and the Echo Isles, known for its bone-rattling rushing charge.

dustwind_harpy.name: Dustwind Harpy
dustwind_harpy.description: A shrieking harpy that swoops from the crags of Drygulch Ravine, striking with dizzying force that leaves prey stumbling and unable to flee.

durotar_tiger.name: Durotar Tiger
durotar_tiger.description: A fierce striped predator stalking the dense jungles and rocky shores of the Echo Isles, capable of closing distance in a terrifying burst of speed.

dustwind_pillager.name: Dustwind Pillager
dustwind_pillager.description: A ruthless bandit haunting the crags of Drygulch Ravine, leaving festering wounds on anyone foolish enough to cross its path.

razormane_scout.name: Razormane Scout
razormane_scout.description: A wiry Razormane quilboar scout that harasses enemies from range before closing to melee, equally dangerous with a thrown quill or a gnashing tusk.

razormane_dustrunner.name: Razormane Dustrunner
razormane_dustrunner.description: A swift Razormane quilboar that moves like the wind across open ground, coating enemies in nature's Faerie Fire to strip their armor and deny them the shadows.

razormane_battleguard.name: Razormane Battleguard
razormane_battleguard.description: A heavily armored Razormane warrior who guards the tribe's territory, raising its guard at the first sign of trouble to deflect incoming blows with practiced precision.

lieutenant_benedict.name: Lieutenant Benedict
lieutenant_benedict.description: A decorated Kul'Tiran officer who commands the keep's garrison, fighting with disciplined precision and a trained eye for openings in enemy attacks.

watch_commander_zalaphil.name: Watch Commander Zalaphil
watch_commander_zalaphil.description: The iron-willed commander of Tiragarde Keep's watch, who holds the line with shield and blade, battering down the guard of any who dare challenge her authority.

burning_blade_thug.name: Burning Blade Thug
burning_blade_thug.description: A hardened thug of the Burning Blade Clan who enforces the clan's will through brute force.

burning_blade_neophyte.name: Burning Blade Neophyte
burning_blade_neophyte.description: A fresh recruit of the Burning Blade Clan, still learning the ways of the cult through violence.

hexed_troll.name: Hexed Troll
hexed_troll.description: A troll whose mind has been twisted by dark hex magic, fighting with frenzied ferocity that betrays the curse binding it.

makrura_snapclaw.name: Makrura Snapclaw
makrura_snapclaw.description: A powerful Makrura crustacean haunting the rocky shores of Durotar. Its massive claw seizes prey in a vice-like Claw Grasp, stunning and locking both combatants into a brutal, relentless exchange.

makrura_elder.name: Makrura Elder
makrura_elder.description: A massive, ancient Makrura lurking along the rocky shores of Durotar. Its vice-like Claw Grasp seizes prey and refuses to let go, forcing a brutal, relentless assault on the same target.

voodoo_troll.name: Voodoo Troll
voodoo_troll.description: A cunning troll shaman of the Echo Isles who channels dark voodoo to sustain himself in battle, weaving Healing Waves between savage melee strikes.

burning_blade_fanatic.name: Burning Blade Fanatic
burning_blade_fanatic.description: A fanatical warrior of the Burning Blade Clan who channels fire into their blade, empowering their strikes with burning fury.

geolord_mottle.name: Geolord Mottle
geolord_mottle.description: A powerful Razormane Geolord who channels the fury of the earth, striking enemies with nature's wrath and reducing their combat effectiveness.

dustwind_savage.name: Dustwind Savage
dustwind_savage.description: A fierce Dustwind harpy stalking the crags of Drygulch Ravine, striking with savage blows that leave prey dazed and reeling.

thunder_lizard.name: Thunder Lizard
thunder_lizard.description: A large, electrically-charged lizard prowling the cliffs of Thunder Ridge, capable of launching bolts of nature energy at prey.

venomtail_scorpid.name: Venomtail Scorpid
venomtail_scorpid.description: A bulky scorpid whose iridescent tail drips with virulent venom, stalking the rocky wastes of Durotar.

dreadmaw_crocolisk.name: Dreadmaw Crocolisk
dreadmaw_crocolisk.description: A massive crocolisk lurking in the river deltas of Durotar, capable of shredding muscle and weakening prey with a single savage bite.

corrupted_dreadmaw_crocolisk.name: Corrupted Dreadmaw Crocolisk
corrupted_dreadmaw_crocolisk.description: A dreadmaw crocolisk warped by creeping corruption, its scales slicked with foul ichor that rots the agility of anything it bites.

makasgar.name: Makasgar
makasgar.description: A hulking troll warrior haunting the wilds of Durotar, relying on brute strength and savage melee skill to overwhelm his prey.

burning_blade_cultist.name: Burning Blade Cultist
burning_blade_cultist.description: A devoted servant of the Burning Blade Clan who combines martial skill with fire magic, calling down Immolate to sear enemies with searing flames.

zalazane.name: Zalazane
zalazane.description: The dark witch doctor of the Echo Isles, Zalazane has enslaved his own tribe with powerful hex magic. He fights with savage cunning, shrinking his foes to sap their strength.

burning_blade_apprentice.name: Burning Blade Apprentice
burning_blade_apprentice.description: A novice spellcaster of the Burning Blade Clan who blends dark shadow magic with melee combat, hurling bolts of shadow at enemies who keep their distance.

corrupted_bloodtalon_scythemaw.name: Corrupted Bloodtalon Scythemaw
corrupted_bloodtalon_scythemaw.description: A Bloodtalon raptor twisted by dark corruption, its talons grown unnaturally massive and its eyes burning with fel light.

corrupted_scorpid.name: Corrupted Scorpid
corrupted_scorpid.description: A scorpid warped by fel corruption, its carapace blackened and its venom transformed into a noxious catalyst that dissolves nature resistance.

dustwind_storm_witch.name: Dustwind Storm Witch
dustwind_storm_witch.description: A Dustwind harpy steeped in storm magic, calling down lightning to punish those who trespass upon her hunting grounds.

lightning_hide.name: Lightning Hide
lightning_hide.description: A thick-scaled lizard crackling with stored lightning, its hide conducting electrical charge that discharges in arcing bolts at anything that draws near.

fizzle_darkstorm.name: Fizzle Darkstorm
fizzle_darkstorm.description: A gnome warlock of the Burning Blade who binds shadow magic with treacherous cunning, leeching vitality from his foes to sustain himself.

felweaver_scornn.name: Felweaver Scornn
felweaver_scornn.description: A Burning Blade warlock who weaves fel shadow into both blade and spell, closing with enemies before blasting them with bolts of dark energy.

death_flayer.name: Death Flayer
death_flayer.description: A massive scorpid whose venom-slicked stinger has claimed the lives of many unwary travelers in the arid wastes of Durotar.

voodoo_slave.name: Voodoo Slave
voodoo_slave.description: A troll whose will has been utterly broken by Zalazane, bound by dark covenant to guard the Circle of Skulls with fanatic devotion. It channels the same shrink hex as its master.

bristleback_thornweaver.name: Bristleback Thornweaver
bristleback_thornweaver.description: A Bristleback quilboar shaman who calls upon primal nature magic to defend the ravine from Tauren encroachment.

bristleback_water_seeker.name: Bristleback Water Seeker
bristleback_water_seeker.description: A Bristleback quilboar who scours the ravine for water sources, patching up wounded tribemates between skirmishes.

mobs._comment_mulgore_narache_beasts: ── Mulgore: Red Cloud Mesa / Camp Narache wildlife ──

prairie_wolf.name: Prairie Wolf
prairie_wolf.description: A lean grey wolf that hunts the windswept mesa surrounding Camp Narache.

plainstrider.name: Plainstrider
plainstrider.description: A long-legged bird that strides across the Mulgore plains in loose flocks.

mountain_cougar.name: Mountain Cougar
mountain_cougar.description: A muscular tawny cat that prowls the rocky hills south of Camp Narache.

mobs._comment_mulgore_plains_beasts: ── Mulgore: Open plains wildlife (Bloodhoof Village area) ──

prairie_wolf_alpha.name: Prairie Wolf Alpha
prairie_wolf_alpha.description: The dominant male of a prairie wolf pack, larger and fiercer than his kin.

swoop.name: Swoop
swoop.description: A large carrion bird that swoops down on prey across the Mulgore grasslands.

prairie_stalker.name: Prairie Stalker
prairie_stalker.description: A large tawny cat that prowls the tall grasses, stalking prey with practiced patience.

flatland_cougar.name: Flatland Cougar
flatland_cougar.description: A sleek, powerful cougar built for explosive speed across open terrain.

greater_plainstrider.name: Greater Plainstrider
greater_plainstrider.description: A fully-grown plainstrider, tall as a Tauren's shoulder, with a powerful kick.

mazzranache.name: Mazzranache
mazzranache.description: A legendary elder plainstrider whose bite carries a virulent infection. The great bird has claimed territory across the whole of Mulgore's central plains.

arra_chea.name: Arra'chea
arra_chea.description: A massive elder kodo beast who has roamed Mulgore since before the Tauren settled the land. The Earthmother's rituals call for her horn.

palemane_poacher.name: Palemane Poacher
palemane_poacher.description: A Palemane gnoll who slaughters Mulgore wildlife and strips their hides for trade.

palemane_skinner.name: Palemane Skinner
palemane_skinner.description: A Palemane gnoll who expertly flays hides from slain beasts, knives always sharp and ready.

palemane_tanner.name: Palemane Tanner
palemane_tanner.description: A Palemane gnoll who works the pelts of slain beasts, treating them with pungent chemicals outside camp.

venture_co_worker.name: Venture Co. Worker
venture_co_worker.description: A Venture Co. goblin swinging a pickaxe in the stolen mines of Mulgore, oblivious to any moral concerns about trespassing on Tauren land.

venture_co_supervisor.name: Venture Co. Supervisor
venture_co_supervisor.description: A Venture Co. goblin overseer who drives workers harder than their pickaxes can swing, always looking to maximize ore output.

supervisor_fizsprocket.name: Supervisor Fizsprocket
supervisor_fizsprocket.description: The Venture Co. site director for the Mulgore operation, Fizsprocket personally oversees the theft of Tauren resources with gleeful efficiency.

baeldun_excavator.name: Bael'dun Excavator
baeldun_excavator.description: A dwarven excavator from Ironforge who is conducting an unauthorized archaeological dig in Mulgore.

baeldun_digger.name: Bael'dun Digger
baeldun_digger.description: A dwarven laborer swinging a heavy pickaxe at the clay of Mulgore, searching for ancient artifacts on behalf of Ironforge.

baeldun_guard.name: Bael'dun Guard
baeldun_guard.description: A seasoned Ironforge soldier assigned to protect the excavation site and discourage any Tauren interference.

windfury_harpy.name: Windfury Harpy
windfury_harpy.description: A harpy of the Windfury clan who rides the wind currents around the Red Rocks, wielding lightning with reckless aggression.

windfury_matriarch.name: Windfury Matriarch
windfury_matriarch.description: The eldest and most powerful harpy of the Windfury clan, able to call down storm lightning with practiced precision.

zhevra_charger.name: Zhevra Charger
zhevra_charger.description: A striped, unicorn-like creature that roams the open Barrens. Its four hooves are prized by hunters.

zhevra_courser.name: Zhevra Courser
zhevra_courser.description: A larger, more powerful zhevra that has grown to maturity on the open plains.

sunscale_lashtail.name: Sunscale Lashtail
sunscale_lashtail.description: A lithe, golden-scaled raptor that prowls the Crossroads territory in small hunting packs.

sunscale_scytheclaw.name: Sunscale Scytheclaw
sunscale_scytheclaw.description: A heavier, battle-scarred raptor whose massive curved claws can rend armor with ease.

savannah_prowler.name: Savannah Prowler
savannah_prowler.description: A sleek tawny lion that hunts the Barrens grasslands alone. Deceptively fast at close range.

bristleback_quilboar.name: Bristleback Quilboar
bristleback_quilboar.description: A bristle-backed quilboar tribesman from Thorn Hill, territorial and belligerent toward any who enter the thornwall.

bristleback_geomancer.name: Bristleback Geomancer
bristleback_geomancer.description: A quilboar shaman who channels earth magic to defend Thorn Hill from Crossroads raiders.

kolkar_pack_runner.name: Kolkar Pack Runner
kolkar_pack_runner.description: A swift Kolkar centaur scout that ranges ahead of raiding parties, carrying stolen goods from fallen adventurers.

kolkar_centaur.name: Kolkar Centaur
kolkar_centaur.description: A Kolkar warrior-centaur that raids the road between the Crossroads and Lushwater Oasis.

kolkar_marauder.name: Kolkar Marauder
kolkar_marauder.description: A hardened Kolkar raider who leads smaller centaur packs in strikes against Crossroads trade caravans.

kolkar_destroyer.name: Kolkar Destroyer
kolkar_destroyer.description: The most feared Kolkar centaur warrior, capable of shattering armor plating with a single blow.

hezrul_bloodmark.name: Hezrul Bloodmark
hezrul_bloodmark.description: The chieftain of the Kolkar clan at Lushwater Oasis. A massive, war-scarred centaur who has claimed countless traveler lives.

witchwing_harpy.name: Witchwing Harpy
witchwing_harpy.description: A wild harpy of the Witchwing flock that nests around the Stagnant Oasis, attacking travelers with wind-charged claws.

witchwing_slayer.name: Witchwing Slayer
witchwing_slayer.description: A more powerful and battle-hardened Witchwing who leads raids on the Stagnant Oasis shores.

deviate_lurker.name: Deviate Lurker
deviate_lurker.description: A small, swift serpent twisted by the Emerald Dream's corruption seeping into the caverns below the Barrens.

deviate_crocolisk.name: Deviate Crocolisk
deviate_crocolisk.description: A crocolisk mutated by the cavern's dream energies, its scales shimmering with unnatural iridescence.

deviate_dreadfang.name: Deviate Dreadfang
deviate_dreadfang.description: A large, razor-fanged serpent that has grown immensely powerful through prolonged exposure to the Wailing Caverns.

druid_of_the_fang.name: Druid of the Fang
druid_of_the_fang.description: A once-noble druid corrupted by the twisted energies of the Wailing Caverns. They retain their spellcasting but serve the Fang.

serpentis.name: Lord Serpentis
serpentis.description: The corrupted leader of the Druids of the Fang, a powerful shaman who commands the deviate creatures of the Wailing Caverns.

young_nightsaber.name: Young Nightsaber
young_nightsaber.description: A young nightsaber cub that prowls the boughs of Shadowglen. Startles easily and attacks if cornered.

grellkin.name: Grellkin
grellkin.description: A mischievous imp-like demon that has slipped into the lower boughs of Teldrassil. Their presence disturbs the forest balance.

webwood_lurker.name: Webwood Lurker
webwood_lurker.description: A small spider lurking in the webbing between Shadowglen branches. Its venom sacs are valuable to alchemists.

young_thistle_bear.name: Young Thistle Bear
young_thistle_bear.description: A young bear native to Teldrassil lower groves. Protective of its territory but avoids conflict unless threatened.

webwood_spider.name: Webwood Spider
webwood_spider.description: A mature web-spinning spider building elaborate funnel webs in the upper boughs of Teldrassil.

webwood_venom_web_spider.name: Webwood Venom Web Spider
webwood_venom_web_spider.description: A large, highly venomous spider threading the deep boughs with strands strong enough to snare deer.

thistle_bear.name: Thistle Bear
thistle_bear.description: A stout bear covered in thistled fur that acts as natural armor. Docile unless provoked, but devastating when angered.

strigid_screecher.name: Strigid Screecher
strigid_screecher.description: A sharp-eyed owl native to the Teldrassil canopy. Its piercing screech can disorient prey from a hundred paces.

bloodfeather_harpy.name: Bloodfeather Harpy
bloodfeather_harpy.description: A harpy of the Bloodfeather clan nesting around Oracle Glade. Territorial and hostile to all who approach their shrines.

bloodfeather_wind_witch.name: Bloodfeather Wind Witch
bloodfeather_wind_witch.description: A harpy spellcaster who channels wind and storm magic at Oracle Glade. Her feathers crackle with static energy.

timberling.name: Timberling
timberling.description: A treant-like creature twisted by corruption seeping through Teldrassil roots. Once gentle forest guardians, now mindlessly hostile.

timberling_mire.name: Timberling Mire
timberling_mire.description: A larger, mud-caked timberling swollen with bog water. Its hardened sap bark makes it extremely resilient.

gnarlpine_ambusher.name: Gnarlpine Ambusher
gnarlpine_ambusher.description: A corrupted furbolg warrior who hides in dense foliage to ambush those venturing into Gnarlpine territory.

gnarlpine_hunter.name: Gnarlpine Hunter
gnarlpine_hunter.description: A corrupted furbolg hunter stalking Starbreeze Village with primitive but effective hunting instincts.

gnarlpine_mystic.name: Gnarlpine Mystic
gnarlpine_mystic.description: A furbolg spellcaster whose nature magic has curdled into something darker under the corruption of Teldrassil.

gnarlpine_shaman.name: Gnarlpine Shaman
gnarlpine_shaman.description: A senior Gnarlpine shaman fully given over to corruption, wielding storm and earth magic against trespassers.

gnarlpine_defender.name: Gnarlpine Defender
gnarlpine_defender.description: A hulking furbolg warrior clad in bark armor guarding the inner sanctum of Ban'ethil Barrow Den.

gnarlpine_ursa.name: Gnarlpine Ursa
gnarlpine_ursa.description: The most savage Gnarlpine warriors, barely distinguishable from the wild bears they once revered.

ursal_the_mauler.name: Ursal the Mauler
ursal_the_mauler.description: The champion of the corrupted Gnarlpine furbolg, a nightmare of muscle and fury patrolling the deepest chamber of Ban'ethil Barrow Den.

crazed_owlkin.name: Crazed Owlkin
crazed_owlkin.description: A large owlkin driven mad by mana energies released when the Exodar crashed into Azuremyst Isle. It attacks anything it encounters.

volatile_mutant.name: Volatile Mutant
volatile_mutant.description: A creature warped beyond recognition by the mana surge of the crashed Exodar. Its body crackles with unstable energy.

manaforged_fragment.name: Manaforged Fragment
manaforged_fragment.description: A living shard of crystallized mana energy that broke free when the Exodar crashed. These fragments pulse with raw arcane power.

infected_nightstalker.name: Infected Nightstalker
infected_nightstalker.description: A feline predator of Azuremyst Isle infected by mana radiation from the crash. The corruption makes it far more aggressive than its kin.

moongraze_stag.name: Moongraze Stag
moongraze_stag.description: A large deer native to Azuremyst Isle that grazes near the arcane streams. Their tendons are used in Draenei cooking and leatherworking.

moongraze_buck.name: Moongraze Buck
moongraze_buck.description: A mature male moongraze deer with a full rack of antlers. Considerably more aggressive than the does when protecting its herd.

crag_boar.name: Crag Boar
crag_boar.description: A stocky boar adapted to the rocky terrain of Azuremyst Isle. Territorial and quick to charge when startled.

ravager.name: Ravager
ravager.description: A purple, beetle-like predator with serrated mandibles that can strip hide from bone in seconds. Native to Draenor but transported accidentally on the Exodar.

mutant_owlkin.name: Mutant Owlkin
mutant_owlkin.description: A larger, more heavily mutated owlkin whose body has been permanently altered by prolonged exposure to mana radiation from the Exodar's crash site.

wrathscale_naiad.name: Wrathscale Naiad
wrathscale_naiad.description: A Wrathscale naga sorceress who has claimed the coastal docks of Azuremyst for her serpentine kin. She commands water magic and heals her allies in battle.

wrathscale_naga.name: Wrathscale Naga
wrathscale_naga.description: A heavily armored Wrathscale naga warrior who holds the shoreline against all intruders. Their clan was drawn to Azuremyst by the power emanating from the Exodar's wreckage.

wrathscale_serpent.name: Wrathscale Serpent
wrathscale_serpent.description: A large sea serpent bound as a guardian by the Wrathscale naga. These creatures patrol the shallows around the naga-held docks.

bristlelimb_furbolg.name: Bristlelimb Furbolg
bristlelimb_furbolg.description: A hostile furbolg from the Bristlelimb tribe that has been driven to madness by demonic corruption. Unlike the peaceful Stillpine furbolg, these assault any who approach.

bristlelimb_shaman.name: Bristlelimb Shaman
bristlelimb_shaman.description: A shaman of the corrupted Bristlelimb tribe who channels corrupted totemic power into destructive lightning and earth magic. They are the most dangerous of the corrupted furbolg.

the_kurken.name: The Kurken
the_kurken.description: The Kurken is an enormous, ancient beast revered by the Stillpine furbolg as a sacred guardian. Corrupted by the same demonic taint that turned the Bristlelimb tribe, it now rampages through the hold.

blood_elf_tracker.name: Blood Elf Tracker
blood_elf_tracker.description: A blood elf ranger who follows the eredar Sironas to Azuremyst Isle. These trackers were dispatched to prevent the Draenei from regaining their strength after the crash.

blood_elf_conjurer.name: Blood Elf Conjurer
blood_elf_conjurer.description: A blood elf mage serving under Sironas. These conjurers fuel their spells by draining the ambient mana energy saturating Silvermyst Isle.

sironas.name: Sironas
sironas.description: Sironas is a man'ari eredar who survived the corruption that took her kin. She leads the blood elves on Silvermyst Isle, working to ensure the Draenei never rebuild their strength.

corrupted_moongraze.name: Corrupted Moongraze
corrupted_moongraze.description: A moongraze deer whose flesh has been permanently warped by the corrupted mana energies saturating Bloodmyst Isle. Its hide is tinged a sickly crimson.

wrath_hound.name: Wrath Hound
wrath_hound.description: A wild wolf driven into a permanent frenzy by the corrupted crystal energies of Bloodmyst Isle. These hounds hunt in small packs and wear crude iron collars stamped with a blood elf insignia.

corrupted_owlkin.name: Corrupted Owlkin
corrupted_owlkin.description: An owlkin of Bloodmyst Isle twisted by prolonged mana corruption into a violent, barely-intelligent creature. Its feathers have taken on a deep crimson tinge.

bloodmyst_ravager.name: Bloodmyst Ravager
bloodmyst_ravager.description: A ravager that has thrived in the corrupted environment of Bloodmyst Isle. Its chitin has hardened to a deep violet and its mandibles are stained with the blood of many prey.

sunhawk_spy.name: Sunhawk Spy
sunhawk_spy.description: A blood elf scout sent ahead of the main Sunhawk force to map Bloodmyst Isle and identify threats to their operation. These spies wear civilian disguises but carry concealed weapons.

nazzivus_satyr.name: Nazzivus Satyr
nazzivus_satyr.description: A satyr who has claimed the tainted ruins of Nazzivian, drawn by the demonic energies seeping from the corrupted crystal structures. These twisted former night elves revel in the corruption.

nazzivus_felsworn.name: Nazzivus Felsworn
nazzivus_felsworn.description: A more powerful Nazzivus satyr who has embraced fel magic to deepen its corruption. These felsworn serve as ritualists, binding demons to their will using the tainted energies of Bloodmyst Isle.

void_anomaly.name: Void Anomaly
void_anomaly.description: A fragment of the void given physical form by the demonic rituals performed at Nazzivian. These anomalies tear reality around them, emitting bursts of destructive shadow energy.

wrathtail_naiad.name: Wrathtail Naiad
wrathtail_naiad.description: A Wrathtail naga sorceress who has claimed the Hidden Reef on Bloodmyst Isle's northern coast. The Wrathtail clan is drawn to Bloodmyst by the corrupted mana energies pulsing from the Vector Coil.

wrathtail_wave_mistress.name: Wrathtail Wave Mistress
wrathtail_wave_mistress.description: A high-ranking Wrathtail naga who commands the tides against intruders at the Hidden Reef. She calls down lightning storms and summons water elementals to destroy those who threaten the clan's hold.

razormaw.name: Razormaw
razormaw.description: Razormaw is an ancient, enormous sea serpent tamed by the Wrathtail naga as a guardian of the Hidden Reef. Its fangs are longer than a Draenei warrior's sword.

sunhawk_defender.name: Sunhawk Defender
sunhawk_defender.description: An armored blood elf soldier of the Sunhawk, deployed to guard the approaches to the base of operations on Bloodmyst Isle. They carry orders directly from Admiral Saltheril.

sunhawk_conjurer.name: Sunhawk Conjurer
sunhawk_conjurer.description: A Sunhawk blood elf mage who channels mana siphoned from the Vector Coil to power devastating spells. They use the corrupted energies of Bloodmyst Isle as an amplifier for their arcane attacks.

sunhawk_legionnaire.name: Sunhawk Legionnaire
sunhawk_legionnaire.description: An elite blood elf soldier of the Sunhawk fleet, veteran of multiple campaigns. These legionnaires form the backbone of the occupation force on Bloodmyst Isle.

sunhawk_harbinger.name: Sunhawk Harbinger
sunhawk_harbinger.description: A Sunhawk officer who serves as a direct herald of Admiral Saltheril. These harbingers carry the admiral's commands to the Vector Coil and execute operations that lesser soldiers cannot handle.

vector_coil_guardian.name: Vector Coil Guardian
vector_coil_guardian.description: A void terror summoned and bound to the Vector Coil by the Sunhawk blood elves. These guardians patrol the crashed naaru vessel, destroying any Draenei who attempt to reach the power core.

bloodcrystal_reaver.name: Bloodcrystal Reaver
bloodcrystal_reaver.description: A massive void construct infused with the corrupt energies of the bloodcrystals that have grown over the Vector Coil. These reavers are the frontline enforcers that the Sunhawk cannot control, but benefit from.

zarakh.name: Zarakh
zarakh.description: Zarakh is an eredar commander who arrived with the Sunhawk blood elves to oversee the corruption of the Vector Coil. He intends to transform the naaru vessel into a weapon of the Burning Legion.

moonstalker.name: Moonstalker
moonstalker.description: A large, silver-pelted feline predator native to the rain-swept coasts of Darkshore. Moonstalkers are solitary hunters that stalk prey for hours before striking with explosive speed.

grizzled_thistle_bear.name: Grizzled Thistle Bear
grizzled_thistle_bear.description: A large brown bear native to the thistled hillsides of Darkshore. These grizzled animals are typically left undisturbed by experienced night elf travelers but attack ferociously if threatened.

grove_tender.name: Grove Tender
grove_tender.description: A once-gentle treant who tended the groves of Darkshore. An unidentified corruption flowing through the roots of the forests has driven these ancient tree guardians to attack any living creature on sight.

darkshore_thresher.name: Darkshore Thresher
darkshore_thresher.description: A large, eel-like predator lurking in the shallows of Darkshore's coastline. Threshers strike with their whip-like tails and can follow prey into the shallows at terrifying speed.

blackwood_warrior.name: Blackwood Warrior
blackwood_warrior.description: A Blackwood furbolg warrior corrupted by an unknown blight that has spread through their den in Darkshore. These once-peaceful furbolg now attack any who approach their territory.

blackwood_ursa.name: Blackwood Ursa
blackwood_ursa.description: A large Blackwood furbolg whose bear-like nature has been amplified by the corruption ravaging the den. These ursa are the heaviest combatants among the corrupted Blackwood tribe.

blackwood_shaman.name: Blackwood Shaman
blackwood_shaman.description: A corrupted Blackwood shaman whose rituals have twisted from nature-communion into a conduit for the blight consuming their den. They carry carved tablets inscribed with corrupted totemic runes.

blackwood_pathfinder.name: Blackwood Pathfinder
blackwood_pathfinder.description: A Blackwood scout and tracker who has been driven into aggression by the corruption. These pathfinders range beyond the den's borders, making travel in Darkshore dangerous even far from the cave entrance.

ruins_golem.name: Ruins Golem
ruins_golem.description: An ancient stone golem crafted by night elf artisans to guard the Ruins of Mathystra. These constructs still follow their original guard directives, having outlasted the civilization that created them by thousands of years.

mathystra_naga.name: Mathystra Naga
mathystra_naga.description: A naga warrior who has invaded the ancient Ruins of Mathystra, excavating the night elf artifacts for some hidden purpose. They tolerate no witnesses to their operation.

mathystra_wave_dancer.name: Mathystra Wave Dancer
mathystra_wave_dancer.description: A naga sorceress who dances among the sea-spray at the ruins' edge, using tidal and lightning magic to destroy excavation rivals. She oversees the naga dig teams at Mathystra.

twilight_acolyte.name: Twilight Acolyte
twilight_acolyte.description: A low-ranking initiate of the Twilight Hammer cult who serves the warlock Athrikus Narassin in the Tower of Althalaxx. They carry inscribed tablets containing corrupted elemental invocations.

twilight_geolord.name: Twilight Geolord
twilight_geolord.description: A senior Twilight Hammer elemental caller who commands earth and lightning within the Tower of Althalaxx. These geolords serve as Athrikus Narassin's inner guard and are among the most dangerous cultists in Darkshore.

athrikus_narassin.name: Athrikus Narassin
athrikus_narassin.description: Athrikus Narassin is the Twilight Hammer warlock who commands the Tower of Althalaxx in Darkshore. He has spent decades communing with the Old Gods, and the power he wields has driven away every night elf patrol sent to confront him.

shatterspear_warrior.name: Shatterspear Warrior
shatterspear_warrior.description: A Shatterspear troll warrior who guards the hidden vale deep in Darkshore's northern reaches. The Shatterspear tribe has long kept to themselves but has grown increasingly hostile toward Sentinel patrols.

shatterspear_headhunter.name: Shatterspear Headhunter
shatterspear_headhunter.description: A Shatterspear troll scout who ranges the perimeter of the vale, removing any intruders who find the hidden path. They collect the heads of enemies as trophies to hang at the vale's entrance.

shatterspear_witch_doctor.name: Shatterspear Witch Doctor
shatterspear_witch_doctor.description: A Shatterspear troll priest who practices voodoo hexes and fetish magic. These witch doctors craft hex dolls tied to specific enemies and use them to inflict suffering from a safe distance.

shatterspear_chieftain.name: Shatterspear Chieftain
shatterspear_chieftain.description: The Shatterspear Chieftain rules the hidden vale with absolute authority. He has united the tribe and forged them into a cohesive fighting force, nursing a deep hatred of the night elves of Auberdine who have hemmed in his people for generations.

ghostpaw_runner.name: Ghostpaw Runner
ghostpaw_runner.description: A large grey wolf native to the ancient forests of Ashenvale. Ghostpaw Runners hunt in loose packs that cover enormous territory, and they are among the most persistent predators in the region.

night_web_spider.name: Night Web Spider
night_web_spider.description: A dark-furred spider that constructs nearly invisible webs between Ashenvale's ancient trees. Night Web Spiders are patient hunters that can sit motionless for days waiting for prey to blunder into their traps.

giant_ashenvale_bear.name: Giant Ashenvale Bear
giant_ashenvale_bear.description: A massive bear whose size rivals that of a horse. These bears are the apex predators of Ashenvale's interior and are respected even by night elf druids who give them a wide berth.

spitelash_naga.name: Spitelash Naga
spitelash_naga.description: A member of the Spitelash naga clan who has claimed Ashenvale's coastal waters and rivers. The Spitelash are drawn by the ancient power in Ashenvale's ley lines and contest any who threaten their claim to the river routes.

foulweald_pathfinder.name: Foulweald Pathfinder
foulweald_pathfinder.description: A Foulweald furbolg scout who ranges beyond the corrupted den's borders. These trackers are fast for their size and have driven out every night elf patrol that has tried to investigate the source of their corruption.

foulweald_ursa.name: Foulweald Ursa
foulweald_ursa.description: A large Foulweald furbolg whose bear-like nature has been amplified by the blight seeping from the den's corrupted shrine. These ursa are the front-line warriors of the Foulweald tribe.

foulweald_shaman.name: Foulweald Shaman
foulweald_shaman.description: A Foulweald furbolg shaman who channels corrupted totemic energy. These shamans carry carved ritual totems through which they focus their tainted earth and lightning magic to devastating effect.

warsong_axe_thrower.name: Warsong Axe Thrower
warsong_axe_thrower.description: A Warsong clan orc deployed to Ashenvale to protect the lumber operation from night elf sentinels. These axe throwers guard the camp's perimeter and are the first line of defense against Alliance raids.

warsong_outrider.name: Warsong Outrider
warsong_outrider.description: A Warsong cavalry orc who patrols the roads around the lumber camp on wolfback. Outriders are responsible for escorting supply caravans and intercepting night elf counterattacks before they reach the main camp.

warsong_shredder.name: Warsong Shredder
warsong_shredder.description: A massive goblin-engineered lumber machine deployed by the Warsong clan to strip Ashenvale's trees at an industrial pace. These shredders are piloted by goblin engineers and armed with spinning blades to deter interruption.

warsong_commander.name: Warsong Commander
warsong_commander.description: A seasoned Warsong officer who coordinates the lumber operation's military force. Warsong Commanders carry the Warchief's direct orders and will sacrifice every soldier in the camp before abandoning the logging effort.

xavian_betrayer.name: Xavian Betrayer
xavian_betrayer.description: A satyr who once was a night elf before accepting the gift of demonic power. Xavian Betrayers have fully surrendered to their corruption and actively work to spread the taint of Xavian into the surrounding forest.

xavian_skulker.name: Xavian Skulker
xavian_skulker.description: A swift and cunning satyr who uses Xavian's ruins as cover for ambushes. Xavian Skulkers carry runic stones that channel demonic energy into precise lightning and arcane strikes.

lord_xavialis.name: Lord Xavialis
lord_xavialis.description: Lord Xavialis is the master of the Xavian satyr enclave, a powerful demon lord who has lorded over these ruins since before the Third War. His demonic power has kept the satyr loyal and the corruption of Xavian spreading steadily westward.

raynewood_treant.name: Raynewood Treant
raynewood_treant.description: An ancient treant who served as a guardian of the Raynewood Retreat for centuries. A corruption rooted in the grove's heart has turned these once-noble beings into raging destroyers that attack everything in their sanctuary.

raynewood_guardian.name: Raynewood Guardian
raynewood_guardian.description: A massive ancient of war whose power rivals that of the great ancients who fought in the War of the Ancients. The corruption that has claimed Raynewood Retreat has transformed this guardian into one of the most dangerous creatures in Ashenvale.

fel_spirit.name: Fel Spirit
fel_spirit.description: A disembodied fel energy drawn to Raynewood Retreat by the corruption festering in its heart. These spirits amplify the grove's corruption with each moment they inhabit it, and must be banished before Raynewood can be healed.

ordanus.name: Ordanus
ordanus.description: Ordanus is a son of Cenarius who has made Raynewood Retreat his domain. Unlike his uncorrupted siblings, Ordanus has been driven into a murderous rage by the fel corruption eating through the grove, and he now destroys all who enter — friend and foe alike.

stonetalon_mountain_lion.name: Stonetalon Mountain Lion
stonetalon_mountain_lion.description: A tawny mountain lion that stalks the rocky ridges of Stonetalon. These lions are the dominant predators of the mountain foothills and are large enough to drag down a fully armored dwarf.

bloodfury_harpy.name: Bloodfury Harpy
bloodfury_harpy.description: A Bloodfury clan harpy who nests in the crags of Stonetalon's rocky outcroppings. The Bloodfury are the most aggressive of Stonetalon's harpy clans, diving without warning on travelers who stray from the road.

greater_thunder_lizard.name: Greater Thunder Lizard
greater_thunder_lizard.description: A thick-scaled thunder lizard whose steps shake the stone paths of Stonetalon. These lizards discharge electricity during combat, and their deep footfalls can be heard long before they come into sight.

stoneclaw_scorpid.name: Stoneclaw Scorpid
stoneclaw_scorpid.description: A grey-shelled scorpid native to Stonetalon's rocky terrain. The Stoneclaw's oversized pincers can crush rock, and its tail-barb delivers a venom that causes deep muscle cramping in large prey.

venture_co_worker_stonetalon.name: Venture Co. Worker
venture_co_worker_stonetalon.description: A Venture Company goblin laborer assigned to the Windshear Crag logging and mining operation. These workers are well-armed for their size — the Venture Co. doesn't pay its laborers to be helpless.

venture_co_geologist.name: Venture Co. Geologist
venture_co_geologist.description: A Venture Company specialist who surveys Windshear Crag for valuable ore and stone deposits. Geologists carry sonic charges for blasting rock faces — and enemies — and know which seams of stone to make unstable.

windshear_shredder.name: Windshear Shredder
windshear_shredder.description: A goblin-piloted lumber shredder deployed by the Venture Company to strip Windshear Crag of its ancient trees. These machines are armored against arrows and equipped with spinning saw blades to discourage interference.

venture_co_foreman.name: Venture Co. Foreman
venture_co_foreman.description: A Venture Company supervisor who manages the labor gangs and shredder crews at Windshear Crag. Foremen are well-compensated and highly motivated to ensure the operation runs — at any cost to the forest or its inhabitants.

grimtotem_warrior.name: Grimtotem Warrior
grimtotem_warrior.description: A Grimtotem tauren fighter stationed in Stonetalon to oppose both the Alliance and the Venture Company. The Grimtotem believe Stonetalon's resources belong to the tauren alone, and they will kill anyone — Horde or Alliance — who enters their territory.

grimtotem_brute.name: Grimtotem Brute
grimtotem_brute.description: A massive Grimtotem tauren whose warclub blows can shatter stone. Grimtotem Brutes are the frontline shock troops of the clan, chosen for their size and ferocity rather than tactical skill.

grimtotem_shaman.name: Grimtotem Shaman
grimtotem_shaman.description: A Grimtotem shaman who performs dark totemic rites to bind the spirits of Stonetalon to the clan's will. These shamans use perverted earth magic that poisons the land rather than nurturing it.

charred_spirit.name: Charred Spirit
charred_spirit.description: The tormented spirit of a tree or creature burned in the great fire that scorched the Charred Vale. Charred Spirits are trapped between life and death and lash out at anything that moves through the blackened forest.

charred_basilisk.name: Charred Basilisk
charred_basilisk.description: A basilisk whose scales have been blackened and hardened by the fires that devastated the Charred Vale. Charred Basilisks are more aggressive than their kin and their petrifying gaze has grown more potent in the scorched air.

magma_elemental.name: Magma Elemental
magma_elemental.description: A living column of magma that has seeped up through the fissures opened by the Charred Vale's great fire. These elementals are drawn to the residual heat in the burned earth and grow larger with each year the vale remains scorched.

charred_ancient.name: Charred Ancient
charred_ancient.description: A colossal ancient of war reduced to a burning husk by the fires that consumed the Charred Vale. The Charred Ancient no longer recognizes friend or foe — it exists only to destroy, its once-noble purpose consumed alongside its bark and leaves.

bloodfury_ripper.name: Bloodfury Ripper
bloodfury_ripper.description: An elite Bloodfury harpy assigned to defend the clan's nesting grounds atop Stonetalon Peak. Rippers are the warrior caste of the Bloodfury clan, fiercer and larger than the common harpy, and trained to fight in close formation.

bloodfury_windwitch.name: Bloodfury Windwitch
bloodfury_windwitch.description: A Bloodfury harpy shaman who commands the wind and lightning above Stonetalon Peak. Windwitches are revered within the clan and serve as advisors to the matriarch, channeling storm energy into lethal magical strikes.

bloodfury_matriarch.name: Bloodfury Matriarch
bloodfury_matriarch.description: The Bloodfury Matriarch is the ruler of the Bloodfury harpy clan, an ancient harpy of enormous size whose shriek can be heard from one end of Stonetalon to the other. She commands her brood from Stonetalon Peak's highest spire and will not surrender it without a fight to the death.

southern_barrens_raptor.name: Southern Barrens Raptor
southern_barrens_raptor.description: A swift predator that roams the dry scrubland of the southern Barrens in loose hunting packs. Barrens raptors are faster than their northern kin and have learned to coordinate their attacks against prey far larger than themselves.

barrens_lion.name: Barrens Lion
barrens_lion.description: A mane-less lion whose tawny coat blends perfectly with the parched Barrens grassland. Barrens Lions are solitary hunters that wait for prey to come to the waterholes before striking with overwhelming speed and power.

greater_plainstrider_barrens.name: Greater Plainstrider
greater_plainstrider_barrens.description: A flightless plains bird standing over two meters tall, common to the flat Barrens scrubland. Greater Plainstriders are peaceful unless cornered — at which point they can shatter a ribcage with a single kick.

barrens_kodo.name: Barrens Kodo
barrens_kodo.description: A massive horned reptile native to the Barrens that travels in small herds along ancient migration paths. Kodo are revered by the tauren and generally left alone by hunters wise enough to know that their charge can overturn a wagon.

razorfen_battleguard.name: Razorfen Battleguard
razorfen_battleguard.description: An armored Razorfen quilboar assigned to guard the outer briar fields surrounding the main compound. Battleguards wear rings of bone through their snouts as marks of martial rank and fight with a reckless ferocity that unsettles even seasoned warriors.

razorfen_geomancer.name: Razorfen Geomancer
razorfen_geomancer.description: A Razorfen shaman who channels earth and lightning magic from the Overgrowth's massive thorn ley-lines. These geomancers wear carved masks that focus the spiritual energy of the briar into their spells.

razorfen_warden.name: Razorfen Warden
razorfen_warden.description: A senior Razorfen quilboar warrior who commands sections of the outer briar wall. Wardens carry jagged-edged axes designed to shred armor and keep intruders from forming any defensive line inside the thorned corridors.

razorfen_thornweaver.name: Razorfen Thornweaver
razorfen_thornweaver.description: A powerful Razorfen shaman who has learned to weave the great thorns of the Overgrowth into magical constructs and healing wards. Thornweavers are treated as high priests within the quilboar hierarchy and rarely engage in direct combat unless forced.

bristleback_warrior.name: Bristleback Warrior
bristleback_warrior.description: A Bristleback quilboar fighter whose back is lined with hardened quill-spines that can puncture light armor on a charge. The Bristleback clan holds the southern Barrens camps and skirmishes constantly with both the Razorfen and Kolkar centaur.

bristleback_shaman.name: Bristleback Shaman
bristleback_shaman.description: A Bristleback shaman who maintains contact with the thorn-spirits beneath the Barrens soil. These shamans perform thorn-binding rites that harden their quills for days at a time, making a Bristleback charge genuinely lethal.

bristleback_thornlord.name: Bristleback Thornlord
bristleback_thornlord.description: A Bristleback champion whose back-spines have grown to exceptional length through years of ritual treatment. The Thornlord's charge is a wall of bone-white quills that can bring down an armored horse and rider simultaneously.

kolkar_hold_drudge.name: Kolkar Drudge
kolkar_hold_drudge.description: A low-ranking Kolkar centaur tasked with raiding caravans and terrorizing tauren settlements in the southern Barrens. Drudges are the shock cavalry of Kolkar warbands — fast, brutal, and entirely without mercy.

kolkar_hold_marauder.name: Kolkar Marauder
kolkar_hold_marauder.description: A veteran Kolkar raider who has earned their brand through years of successful raids against tauren and caravan alike. Marauders carry iron-banded clubs and ride at the front of any assault, daring enemies to stand against their charge.

kolkar_stormseer.name: Kolkar Stormseer
kolkar_stormseer.description: A Kolkar centaur mystic who reads the pattern of lightning strikes across the Barrens sky and translates them into combat magic. Stormseers accompany warbands as living artillery, calling down chain lightning on grouped enemies.

kolkar_khan.name: Kolkar Khan
kolkar_khan.description: The Kolkar Khan commands the entire southern Barrens warband from a fortified hold just off the Gold Road. This centaur warlord has driven off three tauren retaliatory strikes and shows no sign of withdrawing — the Khan has declared the southern Barrens Kolkar territory.

razorfen_defender.name: Razorfen Defender
razorfen_defender.description: A heavily armed Razorfen quilboar stationed inside the Kraul's thorned passages. These defenders are the elite of the Razorfen warrior caste, protecting the inner sanctum where Charlga Razorflank conducts her death rites.

razorfen_spearhide.name: Razorfen Spearhide
razorfen_spearhide.description: A Razorfen quilboar warrior whose body is covered in hafted spines that have been sharpened and treated with a hardening resin. A Spearhide's charge drives those spines into their target, making them simultaneously the weapon and the wielder.

charlga_razorflank.name: Charlga Razorflank
charlga_razorflank.description: Charlga Razorflank is the ancient matriarch of the Razorfen quilboar and a wielder of powerful death magic inherited from the Scourge corruption seeping through the Overgrowth. She sits at the heart of Razorfen Kraul spinning rituals that bind the dead to the briar's will.

screeching_swoop.name: Screeching Swoop
screeching_swoop.description: A large flightless bird that nests in the lower reaches of Thousand Needles' stone canyon. The Screeching Swoop gets its name from the piercing cry it unleashes the moment it spots prey — an effective hunting call that brings the rest of the flock running.

saltstone_basilisk.name: Saltstone Basilisk
saltstone_basilisk.description: A salt-crusted basilisk that haunts the flat basin floor between the needle formations. The Saltstone Basilisk's petrifying gaze crystallizes moisture in the target's joints — victims who survive describe a feeling like their limbs are turning to stone.

needles_cougar.name: Needles Cougar
needles_cougar.description: A lean, dust-colored cougar that hunts the shadowed bases of Thousand Needles' stone spires. These cougars are remarkably patient, sometimes waiting hours at a basin waterhole before lunging at prey with a sudden explosive burst of speed.

galak_scout.name: Galak Scout
galak_scout.description: A Galak centaur forward scout who ranges the canyon floor marking the positions of tauren and Horde patrols. Galak Scouts travel fast and light, reporting back before engaging — unless they judge an enemy isolated enough to kill without support.

whitefeather_swooper.name: Whitefeather Swooper
whitefeather_swooper.description: A larger, more aggressive swoop subspecies that nests in the deep canyon walls. The Whitefeather's pale plumage makes it nearly invisible against Thousand Needles' white salt-stone, and it strikes before most adventurers even see it coming.

saltstone_stalker.name: Saltstone Stalker
saltstone_stalker.description: A larger, canyon-dwelling cousin of the Saltstone Basilisk whose petrifying gaze has grown more powerful from a lifetime in the deeper mineral-rich passages. Stalkers actively pursue prey rather than waiting, making them considerably more dangerous than their kin.

canyon_rock_elemental.name: Canyon Rock Elemental
canyon_rock_elemental.description: A living mass of Thousand Needles' ancient stone given motion by the elemental energy seething through the canyon's mineral veins. Canyon Rock Elementals are nearly indistinguishable from ordinary boulders until they move — a distinction that has killed many careless travelers.

galak_outrunner.name: Galak Outrunner
galak_outrunner.description: A Galak centaur fast-rider who patrols the canyon approaches at a thundering gallop, intercepting anyone who tries to push deeper into Galak territory. Outrunners are the first line of response when scouts spot intruders, and they rarely give their quarry time to prepare.

galak_windchaser.name: Galak Windchaser
galak_windchaser.description: A Galak centaur warrior who fights at a full gallop, using momentum to add devastating force to each lance strike. Windchasers form the main cavalry of Galak warbands, breaking enemy formations with coordinated charges before the infantry moves in.

galak_mauler.name: Galak Mauler
galak_mauler.description: A heavily built Galak centaur who fights with a massive stone-headed maul that can shatter shields and send shockwaves through packed ranks. Maulers are the siege weapons of the Galak warband — where windchasers break the line, maulers grind it to dust.

galak_stormer.name: Galak Stormer
galak_stormer.description: A Galak centaur mystic who channels the electrical energy of Thousand Needles' frequent dry-lightning storms. Stormers carry crystals that have been struck by lightning and charged for months inside the needle formations, and they discharge these in combat with terrifying accuracy.

grimtotem_raider.name: Grimtotem Raider
grimtotem_raider.description: A Grimtotem tauren fighter who has claimed one of Thousand Needles' needle peaks as a stronghold. These raiders are fiercer than their Stonetalon kin — having spent years defending vertical terrain against centaur, they fight with a disciplined aggression born of constant siege.

grimtotem_stomper.name: Grimtotem Stomper
grimtotem_stomper.description: A massive Grimtotem warrior whose ground-shaking stomps are audible from the base of the pinnacle. Stompers guard the approaches to the summit platform, and their thunder-clap strikes can knock climbers off the narrow paths that wind up Darkcloud's stone face.

grimtotem_elder_shaman.name: Grimtotem Elder Shaman
grimtotem_elder_shaman.description: A senior Grimtotem shaman whose mastery of dark totemic and elemental magic makes him a battlefield commander as much as a spellcaster. Elder Shamans lead the ritual binding that keeps the pinnacle's spirit-totems active and serve directly under the Elder Crone.

grimtotem_elder_crone.name: Grimtotem Elder Crone
grimtotem_elder_crone.description: The Grimtotem Elder Crone is the ancient matriarch of the Darkcloud Pinnacle sept, a shaman of fearsome power who has held the summit against centaur and tauren alike for decades. Her dark totemic magic warps the stone of the pinnacle itself into a weapon against those who dare climb to her sanctum.

galak_wrangler.name: Galak Wrangler
galak_wrangler.description: A Galak centaur specialist who controls and drives kodo and other large beasts as both mounts and war-animals. Galak Wranglers are tougher than standard cavalry — the daily work of breaking beasts twice their size leaves them immensely strong and utterly fearless.

galak_bloodseeker.name: Galak Bloodseeker
galak_bloodseeker.description: An elite Galak centaur warrior who has sworn a blood oath to the High Warlord, pledging to kill a set number of enemies before returning to camp. Bloodseekers fight with reckless offensive fury and will pursue fleeing enemies well beyond the hold's boundaries.

galak_high_warlord.name: Galak High Warlord
galak_high_warlord.description: The Galak High Warlord commands the entire centaur presence in Thousand Needles from the fortified Splithoof Hold at the zone's deepest reach. This centaur conqueror has driven the tauren from their ancestral migration routes and has begun testing the defenses of Freewind Post itself.

desolace_kodo_bull.name: Desolace Kodo Bull
desolace_kodo_bull.description: Massive kodo bulls wander the grey wastes of Desolace in small herds, undisturbed by the zone's perpetual gloom.

scorpashi_snapper.name: Scorpashi Snapper
scorpashi_snapper.description: Aggressive scorpid creatures native to the grey plains of Desolace. Their twin pincers can crush bone.

scorpashi_lasher.name: Scorpashi Lasher
scorpashi_lasher.description: A larger and more venomous scorpid found in the deeper wastes. Its barbed tail stinger is capable of punching through thick leather.

desolace_buzzard.name: Desolace Buzzard
desolace_buzzard.description: Gaunt carrion birds that wheel endlessly above the Desolace wastes, waiting for something to fall.

magram_marauder.name: Magram Marauder
magram_marauder.description: A Magram centaur raider, the dominant clan in southern Desolace. They attack intruders on sight with lance and hoof.

magram_stormer.name: Magram Stormer
magram_stormer.description: A veteran Magram warrior who leads raiding parties through the grey plains, his battle cry rallying centaur from across the valley.

gelkis_outrunner.name: Gelkis Outrunner
gelkis_outrunner.description: A swift Gelkis centaur scout patrolling the Valley of Spears. The Gelkis are the Magram's ancient rival clan and attack outsiders just as readily.

gelkis_mauler.name: Gelkis Mauler
gelkis_mauler.description: A hulking Gelkis fighter who specializes in ripping through enemy armor before trampling them beneath four hooves.

burning_blade_cultist_desolace.name: Burning Blade Cultist
burning_blade_cultist_desolace.description: A demon-worshipping cultist who has pledged themselves to the Burning Blade within the ruined halls of Mannoroc Coven.

burning_blade_warlock.name: Burning Blade Warlock
burning_blade_warlock.description: A dark sorcerer who channels fel energy for the Burning Blade. Their corruption taints the soil around Mannoroc Coven for yards in every direction.

mannoroc_lesser_demon.name: Mannoroc Lesser Demon
mannoroc_lesser_demon.description: A lesser demon summoned by the Burning Blade at Mannoroc Coven. These creatures act as sentinels and shock troops for the coven.

mannoroc_greater_demon.name: Mannoroc Greater Demon
mannoroc_greater_demon.description: A powerful demon bound to Mannoroc Coven by the Burning Blade's rituals. Its mere presence warps the earth and fills the air with acrid fel smoke.

satyr_shadowsage.name: Satyr Shadowsage
satyr_shadowsage.description: A satyr sorcerer who dwells in the ruins of Sargeron. These corrupted night elves use shadow magic to ambush travelers in the grey wastes.

desolace_ghost.name: Desolace Ghost
desolace_ghost.description: The wandering spirit of a creature long dead, still haunting the grey wastes of Desolace. Translucent and pitiless, it strikes without warning.

stone_golem_maraudon.name: Stone Golem
stone_golem_maraudon.description: Ancient constructs of living rock that guard the cavern passages of Maraudon, animated by Princess Theradras's elemental will.

maraudon_sprite.name: Maraudon Sprite
maraudon_sprite.description: Corrupted earth sprites that crackle with wild nature energy deep within Maraudon's purple caverns. They attack without warning.

magram_overlord.name: Magram Overlord
magram_overlord.description: The warmaster of the Magram centaur, a towering elite warrior who has broken dozens of challengers under his hooves. His horns are decorated with the skulls of the defeated.

landslide.name: Landslide
landslide.description: A colossal earth elemental that guards the depths of Maraudon. Landslide erupts from the cavern floor without warning, capable of burying an entire party beneath an avalanche of living stone.

bloodfen_raptor.name: Bloodfen Raptor
bloodfen_raptor.description: Raptors that nest in the Bloodfen area of northern Dustwallow Marsh. They hunt in loose packs, using the dense reeds as cover to ambush prey.

bloodfen_screamer.name: Bloodfen Screamer
bloodfen_screamer.description: A larger, battle-scarred raptor whose territorial screech echoes across the Bloodfen wetlands. It claims a much wider hunting ground than its smaller kin.

darkmist_widow.name: Darkmist Widow
darkmist_widow.description: A large spider that haunts the crumbled ruins of the Darkmist area. These widows spin webs capable of snaring creatures twice their size.

darkmist_hatchling.name: Darkmist Hatchling
darkmist_hatchling.description: Newborn Darkmist spiders that scuttle through the ruins in large numbers. Individually harmless, they can overwhelm the unwary in swarms.

darkwater_crocolisk.name: Darkwater Crocolisk
darkwater_crocolisk.description: A wide-jawed crocolisk that lurks just below the surface of Dustwallow's murky channels. It will lie motionless for hours waiting for prey to wade past.

snapjaw_crocolisk.name: Snapjaw Crocolisk
snapjaw_crocolisk.description: A massive crocolisk known for the distinctive snap of its powerful jaws. Its scales are thick enough to deflect sword blows from all but the strongest warriors.

dustwallow_hyena.name: Dustwallow Hyena
dustwallow_hyena.description: Hyenas that scavenge the marshes, drawn by the scent of carrion left by crocolisks and raptors. They attack in cackle packs, using noise and numbers to disorient prey.

grimscale_murloc.name: Grimscale Murloc
grimscale_murloc.description: Murlocs that haunt the tidal flats and river mouths of Dustwallow Marsh. The Grimscale tribe is notable for the coarse grey scales that give them their name.

grimscale_oracle.name: Grimscale Oracle
grimscale_oracle.description: A murloc shaman who serves as spiritual leader for the Grimscale tribe. Oracles channel tidal energy into lightning, healing their kin mid-battle.

theramore_deserter.name: Theramore Deserter
theramore_deserter.description: Former Theramore soldiers who broke ranks and turned hostile, preying on travelers and supply lines across the marsh. Their reasons for deserting are as varied as their crimes.

theramore_conjuror.name: Theramore Conjuror
theramore_conjuror.description: A rogue mage from Theramore's academy who deserted and now uses arcane magic to terrorize the outskirts. Their arcane blasts pack considerably more punch than a sword.

swampwalker.name: Swampwalker
swampwalker.description: Ancient marsh treants whose roots have merged with the swamp floor. They protect the deep groves of Dustwallow with surprising ferocity, attacking intruders with branch and root.

swampwalker_elder.name: Swampwalker Elder
swampwalker_elder.description: Massive elder treants whose trunks have darkened with centuries of marsh growth. Each footfall shakes the ground, and their presence draws other swampwalkers to defend them.

dustwallow_marsh_horror.name: Marsh Horror
dustwallow_marsh_horror.description: A dark elemental that seeps up from the marsh's deepest stagnant pools. Its form shifts between water and shadow, making it nearly impossible to predict its movements.

black_dragon_whelp.name: Black Dragon Whelp
black_dragon_whelp.description: Young black dragons that swarm the Wyrmbog under the matriarch's watch. Though not yet fully grown, their flame is already enough to scorch leather armor.

wyrmbog_scalebane.name: Wyrmbog Scalebane
wyrmbog_scalebane.description: A near-adult black dragonkin patrolling the outer Wyrmbog on the matriarch's orders. Its scales have fully hardened, and it breathes a concentrated stream of corrosive black fire.

grimscale_high_oracle.name: Grimscale High Oracle
grimscale_high_oracle.description: The spiritual elder of the entire Grimscale tribe, a murloc oracle of terrifying power. It channels the full fury of the tidal currents into devastating lightning strikes while healing its kin from across the battlefield.

wyrmbog_matriarch.name: Wyrmbog Matriarch
wyrmbog_matriarch.description: The black dragon matriarch who commands the Wyrmbog from the heart of the bog. Ancient and enormous, she has ruled this stretch of Dustwallow for decades, her corrosive breath dissolving stone and metal alike.

feralas_hippogryph.name: Feralas Hippogryph
feralas_hippogryph.description: Majestic lion-eagle hybrids that soar over the jungle canopy of Feralas. Though naturally cautious, they defend their nesting grounds with powerful talons and a crushing beak.

sprite_darter_nymph.name: Sprite Darter Nymph
sprite_darter_nymph.description: Translucent faerie-dragon creatures that drift through Feralas's ancient jungle. They appear delicate but strike with crackling nature magic that can stun even armored warriors.

feral_scar_yeti.name: Feral Scar Yeti
feral_scar_yeti.description: Enormous yetis that inhabit the Feral Scar cave network in Feralas. Their thick white-grey fur insulates them from cold and deflects lighter blows, and their rage makes them nearly unstoppable once engaged.

gordunni_ogre.name: Gordunni Ogre
gordunni_ogre.description: Two-headed Gordunni ogres who have claimed the ruins of Dire Maul as their territory. They carve crude rune stones that serve as territorial markers and focus points for their rudimentary magic.

gordunni_mauler.name: Gordunni Mauler
gordunni_mauler.description: Elite Gordunni ogre warriors who serve as enforcers and bodyguards. Their preferred tactic is to batter through enemy defenses with sheer mass before stomping the ground to knock opponents prone.

woodpaw_gnoll_pack_runner.name: Woodpaw Pack Runner
woodpaw_gnoll_pack_runner.description: Fast-moving Woodpaw gnoll raiders who use the dense jungle undergrowth to ambush travelers. They harry their prey with hit-and-run attacks before the full pack closes in.

woodpaw_gnoll_alpha.name: Woodpaw Gnoll Alpha
woodpaw_gnoll_alpha.description: The dominant Woodpaw gnoll who leads a pack. Alphas are identified by their scarred muzzles and worn armor cobbled from fallen opponents. Their battle howl sends the pack into a frenzy.

frayfeather_harpy.name: Frayfeather Harpy
frayfeather_harpy.description: Harpies that nest in the Frayfeather Highlands. They dive at intruders from above and use their wind-hardened talons to shred exposed skin and tear at buckles and straps.

frayfeather_screecher.name: Frayfeather Screecher
frayfeather_screecher.description: Larger Frayfeather harpies with magically attuned voices. Their shriek carries a disorienting arcane charge, and they call reinforcements from miles away with a single piercing note.

cliff_giant.name: Cliff Giant
cliff_giant.description: Towering earth giants that stalk the highland ridges of Feralas. Their skin has the texture of granite, and a single blow from their fist can send a warrior skidding across the ground.

mountain_giant.name: Mountain Giant
mountain_giant.description: Ancient mountain giants whose bodies are indistinguishable from the cliff faces they emerge from. They are among the largest terrestrial creatures in Kalimdor and can level entire groves with a single sweep.

grimtotem_warrior_feralas.name: Grimtotem Warrior
grimtotem_warrior_feralas.description: Grimtotem tauren who have established a hostile presence in Feralas, warring against anyone who encroaches on territory they claim for the clan. They fight with brutal efficiency and no quarter.

grimtotem_shaman_feralas.name: Grimtotem Shaman
grimtotem_shaman_feralas.description: Grimtotem shamans who call on dark elemental powers, channelling them against enemies of the clan. They heal wounded warriors mid-battle and call down lightning on those who target them first.

feralas_treant.name: Feralas Treant
feralas_treant.description: Ancient treants that dwell deep in Feralas and within the ruined halls of Dire Maul. Millennia of growth have made their bark harder than iron, and they fight with roots and branches that crack stone.

dire_maul_imp.name: Dire Maul Imp
dire_maul_imp.description: Imps bound within the ancient ruins of Dire Maul, drawn here by the demon Immol'thar's fel influence. These creatures swarm in numbers, hurling fel bolts and screeching warnings to their master.

arcane_golem.name: Arcane Golem
arcane_golem.description: Constructs of arcane-infused stone that guard the inner chambers of Dire Maul. Built by the Highborne who once ruled this place, they follow their last standing orders: destroy all intruders.

gordunni_warchief.name: Gordunni Warchief
gordunni_warchief.description: The supreme warchief of the Gordunni ogre tribe, massive even by ogre standards. He has held the Gordunni together through sheer brutality for decades, and his skull-trophy belt bears the marks of every challenger he has crushed.

immol_thar.name: Immol'thar
immol_thar.description: An immense demon imprisoned within the heart of Dire Maul by the ancient Highborne. Immol'thar has spent millennia feeding on the life force of those bound to contain him, and now that his captors are dead, he is more powerful than ever.

wastewander_bandit.name: Wastewander Bandit
wastewander_bandit.description: Human outlaws who have turned to banditry in the deep desert, raiding caravans crossing the wasteland.

wastewander_rogue.name: Wastewander Rogue
wastewander_rogue.description: Veteran bandits who strike from the shadow of dunes and rocky outcrops, targeting lone travellers.

tanaris_basilisk.name: Elder Stonescale Basilisk
tanaris_basilisk.description: Massive stone-scaled lizards whose petrifying gaze has turned unlucky travellers to statues in the desert sands.

southsea_privateer.name: Southsea Privateer
southsea_privateer.description: Southsea pirates operating out of Lost Rigger Cove, raiding the trade lanes that run along Tanaris's eastern shore.

southsea_freebooter.name: Southsea Freebooter
southsea_freebooter.description: Hardened veterans of the Southsea Freebooters, well-armed pirates who defend Lost Rigger Cove with brutal efficiency.

desert_scorpid.name: Desert Scorpid
desert_scorpid.description: Venomous scorpids that burrow beneath the sand and surge upward to ambush prey that wanders too close.

silithid_wasp.name: Silithid Wasp
silithid_wasp.description: Flying silithid that swarm from their southern hive to sting intruders, coordinating attacks with terrifying insectoid precision.

silithid_creeper.name: Silithid Creeper
silithid_creeper.description: Ground-hugging silithid that tunnel beneath the desert crust, bursting upward to drag prey into their hive warrens.

sandfury_troll.name: Sandfury Troll
sandfury_troll.description: Desert troll warriors who guard the outer perimeter of Zul'Farrak, ferocious and territorial.

sandfury_axe_thrower.name: Sandfury Axe Thrower
sandfury_axe_thrower.description: Elite Sandfury who pelt enemies with thrown axes before closing for melee, fighting in coordinated squads.

dunemaul_ogre.name: Dunemaul Ogre
dunemaul_ogre.description: Massive two-headed ogres who have claimed the Dunemaul Compound as their territory, attacking anything that approaches.

dunemaul_warlock.name: Dunemaul Warlock
dunemaul_warlock.description: Ogre spellcasters who serve the Dunemaul clan's shamanic traditions, wielding fire and shadow with crude but effective power.

tanaris_fire_elemental.name: Blazerunner
tanaris_fire_elemental.description: Volatile fire elementals roaming the scorched reaches of Thistleshrub Valley, drawn to the intense desert heat.

tanaris_water_elemental.name: Tidewalker
tanaris_water_elemental.description: Water elementals that have coalesced along the Southbreak Shore, stirred to aggression by some unseen force beneath the waves.

zulfarrak_warden.name: Zul'Farrak Warden
zulfarrak_warden.description: Elite Sandfury troll soldiers stationed deep inside Zul'Farrak, guarding the inner sanctum and its sacred altars.

tanaris_hyena.name: Desert Hyena
tanaris_hyena.description: Pack hunters that roam the central desert, scavenging what larger predators leave behind and targeting weakened travellers.

sandfury_high_priest.name: Sandfury High Priest
sandfury_high_priest.description: The most powerful holy figure among the Sandfury, conducting dark rites at Zul'Farrak's outer altars to empower the entire tribe.

gahzrilla.name: Gahz'rilla
gahzrilla.description: An ancient frost hydra of immense size, summoned via the Sacred Mallet to the sacred pool at the heart of Zul'Farrak. A beast of terrifying power.

blood_elf_surveyor.name: Blood Elf Surveyor
blood_elf_surveyor.description: Blood elf scholars sent to survey and reclaim ancient Highborne artifacts from the ruins of Azshara.

blood_elf_arcanist.name: Blood Elf Arcanist
blood_elf_arcanist.description: Blood elf battle-mages who protect the survey teams with arcane fire, dangerously skilled at sustained spellweaving.

blood_elf_reclaimer.name: Blood Elf Reclaimer
blood_elf_reclaimer.description: Blood elf warriors tasked with securing relic sites in the ruins, hostile to any who approach their excavations.

azshara_hippogryph.name: Azshara Hippogryph
azshara_hippogryph.description: Wild hippogryphs nesting in the cliffs above the ruins, ferociously territorial against anyone approaching their eyries.

azsharan_wolf.name: Azsharan Wolf
azsharan_wolf.description: Large grey wolves that roam the forested eastern slopes of Azshara, hunting in disciplined packs.

coastal_naga.name: Strand Crawler
coastal_naga.description: Naga warriors who patrol the Shattered Strand, attacking any who trespass on the serpent-folk's coastal territory.

azure_whelp.name: Azure Whelp
azure_whelp.description: Young blue dragons hatchlings that flock around the Bay of Storms, defending the coastal waters their elders claim.

naga_siren.name: Naga Siren
naga_siren.description: Naga spellcasters who weave tidal magic and mental compulsion to lure and destroy victims along the Shattered Strand.

thunderhead_hippogryph.name: Thunderhead Hippogryph
thunderhead_hippogryph.description: Enormous storm-crested hippogryphs that soar the cliffs near the Bay of Storms, capable of generating shockwave dives.

legash_satyr.name: Legash Satyr
legash_satyr.description: Demonic satyrs who have established a camp in northern Azshara, drawing corrupting energy from the nearby ruins.

azshara_crocolisk.name: Riptide Crocolisk
azshara_crocolisk.description: Massive crocolisks lurking in the tidal shallows of the Shattered Strand, ambushing prey with snapping death rolls.

highborne_apparition.name: Highborne Apparition
highborne_apparition.description: The tortured spirits of ancient Highborne night elves, bound to Azshara's ruins for ten thousand years, unable to find rest.

naga_sea_witch.name: Naga Sea Witch
naga_sea_witch.description: The most powerful naga casters on the Shattered Strand, former Highborne sorcerers twisted into serpentine form by Queen Azshara's dark bargain.

legash_darkweaver.name: Legash Darkweaver
legash_darkweaver.description: Satyr warlocks who weave shadow and fire in equal measure, corrupting the ley lines that run through Azshara's ancient ruins.

azure_scalebane.name: Azure Scalebane
azure_scalebane.description: Adolescent blue dragons who have earned their full scales, guarding the Bay of Storms with draconic ferocity.

highborne_lich.name: Highborne Lichling
highborne_lich.description: Highborne spirits so saturated with ancient arcane power that death itself cannot silence their spellweaving.

shattered_strand_warlord.name: Shattered Strand Warlord
shattered_strand_warlord.description: The naga commander of the Shattered Strand, a towering serpent warrior who has driven every expedition from the coastline for years.

elder_azure_drake.name: Elder Azure Drake
elder_azure_drake.description: An ancient blue dragon of immense power who rules the Bay of Storms, its control over storm and sea making approach near suicidal.

frostbit_spider.name: Frostbit Spider
frostbit_spider.description: Enormous frost-hardened spiders that nest in the icy crags at the southern pass into Winterspring.

cobalt_wyvern.name: Cobalt Wyvern
cobalt_wyvern.description: Blue-scaled wyverns that circle the frozen valleys of Winterspring, nesting in the high cliffs above the ruins.

keltheril_apparition.name: Kel'Theril Apparition
keltheril_apparition.description: The bound spirits of ancient Highborne night elves entombed beneath the frozen Lake Kel'Theril, unable to find peace after ten thousand years.

winterfall_warrior.name: Winterfall Warrior
winterfall_warrior.description: Corruption-maddened Winterfall furbolg warriors who attack any intruder approaching their village in the central snowfields.

winterfall_den_watcher.name: Winterfall Den Watcher
winterfall_den_watcher.description: Elite furbolg sentinels stationed at the perimeter of the Winterfall dens, larger and more dangerous than ordinary warriors.

frostsaber.name: Frostsaber
frostsaber.description: Massive white-coated saber cats native to Winterspring's frozen highlands, prized by night elf hunters for their speed and ferocity.

ice_thistle_yeti.name: Ice Thistle Yeti
ice_thistle_yeti.description: Shaggy white yeti who roam the frozen reaches of Winterspring in territorial packs, fiercely guarding their hunting grounds.

winterfall_shaman.name: Winterfall Shaman
winterfall_shaman.description: Corrupted Winterfall furbolg spiritualists who channel chaotic elemental magic, amplifying the bloodlust of nearby warriors.

chillwind_chimera.name: Chillwind Chimera
chillwind_chimera.description: Two-headed draconic chimera that prey on anything moving across the frozen reaches, striking simultaneously with fang and horn.

cobalt_scalebane.name: Cobalt Scalebane
cobalt_scalebane.description: Adult blue drakes who patrol the high ridges of northern Winterspring, fiercely territorial and devastating in melee combat.

cobalt_mageweaver.name: Cobalt Mageweaver
