cobalt_mageweaver.description: Blue dragons who channel storm magic from a distance, bombarding intruders with chain lightning before closing to melee.

frostmaul_giant.name: Frostmaul Giant
frostmaul_giant.description: Towering frost giants who have claimed Darkwhisper Gorge's approaches, each one capable of swatting a mounted rider from the saddle.

keltheril_lichling.name: Kel'Theril Lichling
keltheril_lichling.description: The most powerful of the Kel'Theril spirits, ancient Highborne archmages whose spellweaving survived death itself and cannot be silenced.

darkwhisper_abyssal.name: Darkwhisper Abyssal
darkwhisper_abyssal.description: Lesser demonic servants haunting the approaches to Darkwhisper Gorge, bound to serve greater demons within its depths.

ice_thistle_matriarch.name: Ice Thistle Matriarch
ice_thistle_matriarch.description: The alpha female of the Ice Thistle yeti packs, nearly twice the size of a normal yeti and many times more dangerous.

darkwhisper_terrordar.name: Darkwhisper Terrordar
darkwhisper_terrordar.description: Powerful demons of Darkwhisper Gorge who were drawn to Winterspring by the same ley line corruption the satyrs exploit to the south.

winterfall_high_shaman.name: Winterfall High Shaman
winterfall_high_shaman.description: The supreme spiritual leader of the corrupted Winterfall furbolg, conducting rituals that plunge the entire tribe ever deeper into madness.

darkwhisper_lord.name: Darkwhisper Lord
darkwhisper_lord.description: The demon lord who rules Darkwhisper Gorge, an ancient entity of immense power that feeds on the fear radiating from Winterspring's frozen dead.

angerclaw_bear.name: Angerclaw Grizzly
angerclaw_bear.description: Massive grizzlies warped by Felwood's fel corruption, their fur matted with sickly green ichor and their tempers hair-trigger violent.

felwood_corrupted_wolf.name: Felwood Vile Wolf
felwood_corrupted_wolf.description: Wolves driven mad by the corrupting fel energy seeping through Felwood's soil, hunting in erratic frenzy rather than coordinated packs.

jadefire_trickster.name: Jadefire Trickster
jadefire_trickster.description: Lesser Jadefire satyrs who roam the edge of their territory, harrying travellers with illusions and hit-and-run attacks.

angerclaw_mauler.name: Angerclaw Mauler
angerclaw_mauler.description: Fully grown Angerclaw bears whose fel corruption has pushed their aggression to an all-consuming, mindless state of rage.

jadefire_satyr.name: Jadefire Satyr
jadefire_satyr.description: Jadefire satyr warriors who hold Jadefire Run against all intruders, fierce servants of the demonic corruption spreading through Felwood.

irontree_wanderer.name: Irontree Wanderer
irontree_wanderer.description: Ancient treants of Irontree Woods twisted by the fel corruption, their bark turned black and their sap a toxic green ichor.

deadwood_pathfinder.name: Deadwood Pathfinder
deadwood_pathfinder.description: Deadwood furbolg scouts who range the forest paths, the fel corruption that claimed them burning in their eyes as green fire.

corrupted_wildkin.name: Corrupted Wildkin
corrupted_wildkin.description: Owlbeasts whose connection to the moon goddess has been severed by the fel taint, now raging hulks driven by instinctual violence.

jadefire_felsworn.name: Jadefire Felsworn
jadefire_felsworn.description: Elite Jadefire satyrs who have sworn themselves fully to demonic power, wielding a blend of arcane and fel magic with dangerous proficiency.

irontree_stomper.name: Irontree Stomper
irontree_stomper.description: Massive corrupted ancients who have lost all memory of their former selves, now thundering through Irontree Woods crushing anything in their path.

deadwood_avenger.name: Deadwood Avenger
deadwood_avenger.description: Veteran Deadwood furbolg warriors who claim to fight in the name of a tribe that the corruption consumed years ago.

deadwood_shaman.name: Deadwood Shaman
deadwood_shaman.description: Deadwood furbolg spirit-callers who channel the corrupted ley lines beneath Felwood into chaotic elemental strikes.

jaedenar_cultist.name: Jaedenar Cultist
jaedenar_cultist.description: Former mages and priests who have surrendered themselves to the Shadow Council, operating out of the underground halls of Jaedenar.

jaedenar_warlock.name: Jaedenar Warlock
jaedenar_warlock.description: Shadow Council warlocks who conduct fell experiments within the depths of Jaedenar, binding demons to their will with dark contracts.

withered_ancient.name: Withered Ancient
withered_ancient.description: Once-mighty ancients now so saturated with fel corruption that their bark weeps acidic sap and their every movement shakes the blighted ground.

jaedenar_houndmaster.name: Jaedenar Houndmaster
jaedenar_houndmaster.description: Elite Jaedenar soldiers who command fel hounds within Shadow Hold, the most physically dangerous of the mortal servants of the Shadow Council.

jadefire_warlord.name: Jadefire Warlord
jadefire_warlord.description: The military commander of the Jadefire satyrs in Felwood, a demon of considerable power whose directives keep the entire Jadefire Run in a constant state of war.

jaedenar_shadow_lord.name: Jaedenar Shadow Lord
jaedenar_shadow_lord.description: The Shadow Council's supreme representative in Felwood, a demon lord who governs Jaedenar's operations and channels the fel corruption poisoning the entire forest.

ungoro_ravasaur.name: Un'Goro Ravasaur
ungoro_ravasaur.description: A sleek, fast-moving raptor that stalks the crater floor in coordinated packs. Its serrated claws can strip leather armor in seconds.

ungoro_gorilla.name: Un'Goro Gorilla
ungoro_gorilla.description: A powerfully built gorilla claiming territory near the crater entrance. It pounds the earth to warn intruders before charging with both fists.

ungoro_pterrordax.name: Un'Goro Pterrordax
ungoro_pterrordax.description: A leathery-winged pterosaur that rides the thermals above Un'Goro's canopy. It swoops low to snatch prey with barbed claws.

lakkari_tar_lurker.name: Lakkari Tar Lurker
lakkari_tar_lurker.description: A semi-sentient mass of volcanic tar that lurks at the edges of the Lakkari Tar Pits. It spits globs of boiling tar to slow fleeing prey.

ungoro_stegodon.name: Un'Goro Stegodon
ungoro_stegodon.description: A massive armoured dinosaur with a ridge of bony spines running the length of its back. Generally ignores smaller creatures until provoked.

bloodpetal_lasher.name: Bloodpetal Lasher
bloodpetal_lasher.description: A carnivorous plant-creature that uses vine-like tendrils to lash at anything that brushes its petals. It releases numbing spores when wounded.

ungoro_stomper.name: Un'Goro Stomper
ungoro_stomper.description: A bipedal theropod with a crushing bite and earth-shaking footsteps. It hunts near Fire Plume Ridge, drawn by the warmth of the volcanic vents.

crystal_elemental.name: Crystal Elemental
crystal_elemental.description: A crystalline entity formed from the strange arcane-infused minerals that grow in Un'Goro's groves. It fires razor shards when threatened.

ungoro_silithid_worker.name: Un'Goro Silithid Worker
ungoro_silithid_worker.description: An insectoid silithid from the Slithering Scar colony. Workers forage the crater floor and relay warning signals through pheromone bursts.

fire_plume_elemental.name: Fire Plume Elemental
fire_plume_elemental.description: A fire elemental drawn to the volcanic vents of Fire Plume Ridge. It coats itself in a sheath of flame that burns attackers on contact.

bloodpetal_trapper.name: Bloodpetal Trapper
bloodpetal_trapper.description: A larger, more aggressive bloodpetal that drags prey into its digestive folds with thick entangling vines. It guards the seeds with its life.

ungoro_silithid_ravager.name: Un'Goro Silithid Ravager
ungoro_silithid_ravager.description: A combat-caste silithid stationed as a guardian near the Slithering Scar hive entrance. It charges on sight and frenzies as its health drops.

fire_plume_rager.name: Fire Plume Rager
fire_plume_rager.description: A fully awakened fire elemental born from the heart of Fire Plume Ridge's volcanic core. Its eruption ability sends burning rocks raining in all directions.

lakkari_tar_beast.name: Lakkari Tar Beast
lakkari_tar_beast.description: A massive tar elemental that has grown far beyond lurker-size from prolonged contact with the pit's volcanic heat. Its grip immobilizes prey completely.

ungoro_thunderer.name: Un'Goro Thunderer
ungoro_thunderer.description: The largest theropod in Un'Goro, its footfalls send tremors through the ridge. Its roar silences spellcasters and sends smaller creatures fleeing.

gorilla_silverback.name: Silverback Gorilla
gorilla_silverback.description: The dominant male of Un'Goro's gorilla packs, recognizable by the silver fur across its broad back. It protects its troop with devastating thunderclaps.

ungoro_devilsaur.name: Un'Goro Devilsaur
ungoro_devilsaur.description: A massive apex predator that roams the eastern reaches of Un'Goro Crater. Adventurers have learned to track the ground tremors it leaves in its wake — by then it is almost too late.

slithering_scar_queen.name: Slithering Scar Queen
slithering_scar_queen.description: The breeding queen of the Slithering Scar silithid colony. She can burrow beneath the ground to reposition and calls waves of workers to her defense when cornered.

twilight_marauder.name: Twilight Marauder
twilight_marauder.description: A Twilight's Hammer shock trooper who guards the ruins and cult outposts scattered across Silithus. They attack on sight and fight without regard for their own lives.

twilight_stonecaller.name: Twilight Stonecaller
twilight_stonecaller.description: A cult elementalist who channels the energies of earth and stone. Their ritual texts document how the Old Gods speak through Silithus's ley convergence.

twilight_avenger.name: Twilight Avenger
twilight_avenger.description: A veteran Twilight's Hammer warrior stationed near the hive perimeters. They serve as enforcers — punishing cultists who waver and driving off outsiders who stray too close.

twilight_dark_shaman.name: Twilight Dark Shaman
twilight_dark_shaman.description: A senior cultist shaman who has devoted years to communing with the elemental lords summoned through the windstone rituals. Their encrypted texts are filled with Old God scripture.

twilight_geolord_silithus.name: Twilight Geolord
twilight_geolord_silithus.description: A commander-grade earth channeler who coordinates the Twilight's Hammer operations in the Crystal Vale. The geolords answer only to the inner circle of the cult.

dust_stormer.name: Dust Stormer
dust_stormer.description: A wind elemental that scours the Silithus wastes, carrying fine sand that strips flesh from bone. It leaves a haze of choking dust wherever it travels.

whirling_sandstorm.name: Whirling Sandstorm
whirling_sandstorm.description: A fully formed vortex elemental that lifts boulders and bodies alike into its spinning mass. Its sand-blind ability disorients targets before the main body hits them.

obsidian_destroyer.name: Obsidian Destroyer
obsidian_destroyer.description: A towering obsidian rock elemental animated by the volcanic energies still seething beneath Silithus. Its outer shell is nearly impenetrable until you find the crystalline seams.

hivezora_wasp.name: Hive'Zora Wasp
hivezora_wasp.description: A flying silithid from the Hive of Zora that patrols the perimeter of the nest. It dives on targets from above, injecting paralysing venom before retreating to attack again.

hivezora_reaver.name: Hive'Zora Reaver
hivezora_reaver.description: A ground-assault silithid from Hive Zora armed with bladed forelegs capable of cutting through plate. It frenzies when below half health, attacking twice as fast.

hivezora_hive_guard.name: Hive'Zora Hive Guard
hivezora_hive_guard.description: An elite soldier-caste silithid stationed at the tunnel entrances of Hive Zora. It releases a screech that calls nearby wasps to converge on the threat.

hiveregal_stinger.name: Hive'Regal Stinger
hiveregal_stinger.description: A silithid from the Hive of Regal that specializes in swift venom delivery. The venom of the Regal stingers is notably more potent than that found in any other silithid colony.

hiveregal_overseer.name: Hive'Regal Overseer
hiveregal_overseer.description: A commander-caste silithid that directs the Regal hive's expansion efforts. Killing an overseer disrupts the coordination of nearby worker swarms for several minutes.

hiveregal_colossus.name: Hive'Regal Colossus
hiveregal_colossus.description: The largest silithid caste within Hive Regal — a living siege engine bred to break defensive lines. Its carapace shrugs off normal weapons with contemptuous ease.

silithid_flyer.name: Silithid Flyer
silithid_flyer.description: A large airborne silithid that nests in the cliffs of the Abyssal Sands. Its wing buffet can knock armoured warriors off their feet.

silithid_sand_terror.name: Silithid Sand Terror
silithid_sand_terror.description: A massive subterranean silithid that ambushes prey by erupting from beneath the sand. Its claws can shear through stone.

twilight_high_marshal.name: Twilight High Marshal
twilight_high_marshal.description: The supreme military commander of the Twilight's Hammer forces in Silithus. He has coordinated the cult's elemental summoning rituals for years and wears armour forged in the windstone fires.

ancient_sand_reaver.name: Ancient Sand Reaver
ancient_sand_reaver.description: A silithid of impossible size that has prowled the Abyssal Sands since before the Third War. Cenarion scouts believe it predates the current silithid expansion — a remnant of Silithus's first infestation.

earthborer.name: Earthborer
earthborer.description: A large burrowing worm that tunnels through the volcanic rock of Ragefire Chasm.

molten_elemental.name: Molten Elemental
molten_elemental.description: A churning mass of molten rock and flame born from the volcanic heat of Ragefire Chasm.

ragefire_trogg.name: Ragefire Trogg
ragefire_trogg.description: A brutish trogg driven mad by the heat and dark energies of Ragefire Chasm.

ragefire_shaman.name: Ragefire Shaman
ragefire_shaman.description: A trogg shaman who has absorbed chaotic elemental power from the chasm flames.

searing_blade_enforcer.name: Searing Blade Enforcer
searing_blade_enforcer.description: A hardened Searing Blade warrior who enforces cult discipline in the chasm.

searing_blade_cultist.name: Searing Blade Cultist
searing_blade_cultist.description: A devoted member of the Searing Blade cult who channels shadow energy in service to the Old Gods.

searing_blade_warlock.name: Searing Blade Warlock
searing_blade_warlock.description: A senior warlock of the Searing Blade, capable of summoning demonic minions and weaving fel curses.

voidwalker_minion.name: Voidwalker Minion
voidwalker_minion.description: A voidwalker demon summoned by a Searing Blade warlock to serve as a guardian.

oggleflint.name: Oggleflint
oggleflint.description: A massive ogre warlord who has made the right corridors of Ragefire Chasm his domain.

taragaman_the_hungerer.name: Taragaman the Hungerer
taragaman_the_hungerer.description: A ravenous demon bound to the central chamber of Ragefire Chasm, perpetually hungry for souls.

jergosh_the_invoker.name: Jergosh the Invoker
jergosh_the_invoker.description: The high warlock of the Searing Blade, overseeing the dark rituals in Ragefire Chasm.

bazzalan.name: Bazzalan
bazzalan.description: A demon lieutenant of the Burning Legion posing as a Searing Blade cultist, commanding the final chamber.
